added-contacts-campaign: %count% contacts have been added to the campaign.
new-contact-agent-body: Hello {name}, you have been assigned to the contact {contact}. You can see it from here: {url}
new-opportunity-agent-body: Hi {name}, {author} has assigned you the opportunity {number}. You can see more details from here: {url}
new-opportunity-assignee-body: Hi {name}, {author} has assigned you the opportunity {number}. You can see more details from here: {url}
new-opportunity-file-body: Hi {name}, {author} has added a file to opportunity {number}. You can see it from here: {url}
new-opportunity-note-body: Hi {name}, {author} has added a note to the opportunity {number}. You can see the note from here: {url}
notify-new-contact-agent: Notify agent when a contact is assigned
notify-new-oppo-agent: Notify the agent when an opportunity is assigned
notify-new-oppo-assignee: Notify assignee when an opportunity is assigned
notify-new-oppo-notes: Notify when a note is added to an opportunity
notify-note-body: Hello {name}, you have scheduled the notification of the note {number}. Click here: {url}
